description: A curated collection of high-quality learning materials, research papers, datasets, frameworks, and practical guides covering every major area of Artificial Intelligence  including Machine Learning, Deep Learning, NLP, Computer Vision, Generative AI, Reinforcement Learning, and MLOps.

Amazon EMR is a cloud big data platform for running large-scale distributed data processing jobs, interactive SQL queries, and machine learning applications using open-source analytics frameworks such as Apache Spark, Apache Hive, Apache HBase, Apache Flink, Apache Hudi, and Presto.

Altfit is an advanced movement analysis framework powered by machine learning. It utilizes TensorFlow Lite models to process motion-related data, enabling applications in fitness tracking, rehabilitation, sports performance optimization, and biomechanical assessments.

Streamlit is an open-source Python framework that makes it easy to build and share beautiful, custom web apps for machine learning and data science. With Streamlit, you can turn data scripts into shareable web applications in minutes without needing front-end experience.

brpc is an Industrial-grade RPC framework using C++ Language, which is often used in high performance system such as Search, Storage, Machine learning, Advertisement, Recommendation etc. "brpc" means "better RPC".
A set of Docker images that include popular frameworks for machine learning, data science and visualization.

The discovery and optimization of metallocene catalysts for olefin copolymerization traditionally rely on extensive experimental trial-and-error. This project presents a data-driven framework that integrates molecular descriptors, density functional theory (DFT) calculations, and machine learning (ML) models to accelerate catalyst development.

# Rule-Based Python Chatbot (Non-AI)  A simple, explicit Python chatbot that responds to user input using strict rule-based logic and keyword matching. This project is a hands-on exploration of conditional programming and string manipulation in Python, completely free of AI or Machine Learning frameworks.
Production-ready MLOps framework powered by Apache Airflow. Automates CI/CD for machine learning architectures, managing scheduled model retraining, data drift monitoring, and artifact versioning.

A modular Python framework for fairness-aware post-processing in machine learning.  The library takes classifier probabilities and learns optimal decision thresholds  by optimizing multiple fairness and performance metrics, enabling multi-objective  selection via methods such as TOPSIS and Zenith.

A multi-sensor remote sensing calibration framework for integrating PlanetScope, Sentinel-2 and UAV multispectral imagery using machine learning regression models. The workflow performs spatial resampling, multi-source feature fusion, supervised calibration with Random Forest or Gradient Boosting and crop stress analysis.
A CNN-based machine learning framework for Cavity Ring-Down Spectroscopy (CRDS), designed to analyze biomarkers and quantify their spectral intensities from spectroscopic signals.

Es un framework avanzado para la ejecucin de pipelines de datos que combina automatizacin, escalabilidad y flexibilidad. Diseado para simplificar la gestin de flujos de trabajo complejos de datos, desde ETL tradicionales hasta pipelines de Machine Learning.

An automated, real-time DDoS detection and mitigation framework leveraging Software-Defined Networking (SDN Floodlight), Mininet, and Machine Learning (RandomForest on CICIDS2017).

An end-to-end NLP & Machine Learning framework for real-time Twitter spam/phishing classification. Features TF-IDF text representation, custom behavioral heuristic engineering, dynamic risk metric scoring, and class-weighted inference models.

An angle calculator that is based on google's open source machine learning framework "mediapipe" that takes in a footage of a person walking and calculates different types of angles at each frame throughout the video. This is necessary for physicians to diagnose certain locomative related diseases.

Master Thesis 2026: Security and Robustness of Automated Credit Decision Algorithms. This repository contains the complete implementation of machine learning-based credit scoring systems, adversarial attack simulations, robustness metrics, defense mechanisms, and evaluation framework developed at Aalborg University.

A comprehensive repository of data science and machine learning notebooks. Focuses on end-to-end pipelines, exploratory data analysis (EDA), advanced statistical modeling, and predictive analytics. Built using Python, SQL, and core ML frameworks to solve complex business problems and derive data-driven insights.

A comprehensive framework for adversarial robustness testing and red teaming of machine learning models. This project implements various adversarial attacks, robustness evaluation metrics, and visualization tools to assess the security and reliability of AI systems.

A general framework for building fast machine-learning surrogates of expensive physics simulations. Train models on simulation outputs, then plug the learned predictions back into the MOOSE-based porous medium flow solver to accelerate engineering workflows with better accuracy.
A comprehensive framework for detecting and assessing bias in machine learning models, designed for research and educational purposes.

DynaSys-EEG is an AI driven framework that models EEG signals as dynamic systems to analyze brain activity, detect patterns, and improve neurological research. It combines machine learning, signal processing, and LOSO evaluation for accurate scalable analysis.
